synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-0458 Moderate: Oracle Linux 9 libpq security update
description:
[13.23-1]
- Rebase to upstream release 13.23
- Resolves: RHEL-131279 (CVE-2025-12818)
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-0458

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-0458.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
libpq-13.23-1.el9_7.i686.rpm
libpq-13.23-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
libpq-devel-13.23-1.el9_7.i686.rpm
libpq-devel-13.23-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
libpq-13.23-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
libpq-devel-13.23-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/libpq-13.23-1.el9_7.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-12818




Description of changes:

[13.23-1]
- Rebase to upstream release 13.23
- Resolves: RHEL-131279 (CVE-2025-12818)
